parameters.query:
with existing_batch as (
    select id
    from signup_batches
    where status = 'Processing'
    order by id desc
    limit 1
),
candidate_rows as (
    select id
    from member_signups
    where status = 'New'
),
new_batch as (
    insert into signup_batches (status)
    select 'Processing'
    where not exists (select 1 from existing_batch)
      and exists (select 1 from candidate_rows)
    returning id
),
selected_batch as (
    select id from existing_batch
    union all
    select id from new_batch
),
updated_signups as (
    update member_signups s
    set status = 'Processing',
        batch_id = (select id from selected_batch limit 1)
    where s.id in (select id from candidate_rows)
      and exists (select 1 from selected_batch)
    returning s.id, s.batch_id
)
select
    (select id from selected_batch limit 1) as batch_id,
    coalesce((select count(*) from updated_signups), 0) as signup_count,
    case
        when exists (select 1 from existing_batch)
         and exists (select 1 from updated_signups) then 'Added new signups to existing processing batch'
        when exists (select 1 from existing_batch) then 'Using existing processing batch'
        when exists (select 1 from updated_signups) then 'Processing'
        else 'No new signups available'
    end as message;
